sv_cgiab/translocation_sv_inspector_view.name: sv_cgiab/translocation_sv_inspector_view
sv_cgiab/translocation_sv_inspector_view.note: boxed the SV_20 grid row (chr3:139,976,414, the chr3<->chr13 CHROMOPLEXY translocation that translocation_breakpoint_split drills into) instead of the chord itself: confirmed via React-fiber feature lookup that the matching chord is data-testid chord-vcf-19, but its 1px stroke has no reliable on-screen anchor for hover/box (geometry does not map cleanly through the circular view screen transform); the grid row carries the same identity in readable text and is the dependable anchor. Added a hover action (text match) first since the row is mounted in the DataGrid virtualization buffer but scrolled out of the visible viewport; Puppeteer auto-scrolls on hover.

jbrowse-img/dark_theme.name: jbrowse-img/dark_theme
jbrowse-img/dark_theme.note: fixed (source): worker-side feature label/description colors are baked at feature-fetch time from session.themeOptions, but jb2export only applied --themeName at rasterization (after fetch), so descriptions used the light-theme dark blue (illegible on dark). renderRegion.tsx now calls session.setThemeName(themeName) up front before any fetch. Gene descriptions now render in the dark-tuned light blue (blue[300]). Regenerated + synced.

jbrowse-img/hg38_hs1_mm39_synteny.name: jbrowse-img/hg38_hs1_mm39_synteny
jbrowse-img/hg38_hs1_mm39_synteny.note: resolved: not manual (autogenerated by @jbrowse/img). Re-rendered — autoDiagonalize now applies; the hs1<->mm39 lower level reorders from a crossing hairball into legible diagonal blocks (top hg38<->hs1 level stays near-vertical). cigar indels not visible at whole-genome scale.

jbrowse-img/methylation.name: jbrowse-img/methylation
jbrowse-img/methylation.note: resolved: not manual — autogenerated by @jbrowse/img (jb2export) from products/jbrowse-img/README.md examples, copied in by generate-img-doc.ts. audit-figures.ts now classifies /img/jbrowse-img/* as type "jbrowse-img" so figure-manifest.json no longer mislabels them as manual.

jbrowse-img/hs1_mm39_synteny.name: jbrowse-img/hs1_mm39_synteny
jbrowse-img/hs1_mm39_synteny.note: resolved: not manual (autogenerated by @jbrowse/img). Re-rendered — autoDiagonalize now applies in jb2export SSR (committed PNG predated it), so mm39 chromosomes reorder and the ribbons read cleanly. cigar indels are not drawn at whole-genome scale, so the cigar-off ask is moot here.

hg38_assembly_table.name: hg38_assembly_table
hg38_assembly_table.note: fixed: now autogenerated. New hg38_only.json config + admin mode -> Assembly manager shows the hg38 row (GRCh38 alias, edit/delete actions). Current UI, stable title.

jbrowse-img/yeast_synteny.name: jbrowse-img/yeast_synteny
jbrowse-img/yeast_synteny.note: resolved: not manual (autogenerated by @jbrowse/img). Added a --drawCurves CLI flag and re-rendered with it — the ribbon is now a smooth bezier instead of straight trapezoids. render-comparative-examples.sh + README updated.

jbrowse-img/yeast_dotplot.name: jbrowse-img/yeast_dotplot
jbrowse-img/yeast_dotplot.note: resolved: not manual (autogenerated by @jbrowse/img). Added a --autoDiagonalize CLI flag (options.ts/main.ts/renderRegion.tsx) and re-rendered with it — the R64 contigs reorder so the alignment forms a clean continuous diagonal instead of the old staircase. render-comparative-examples.sh + README updated.

jbrowse-img/skbr3_cov.name: jbrowse-img/skbr3_cov
jbrowse-img/skbr3_cov.note: fixed (source): SVGRuler.tsx now skips the per-region tick marks when a block is <150px wide. At whole-genome scale the small chromosomes (16-22, X, Y) crowded minor ticks under their refName labels; they now show a clean label only, while wider chromosomes keep their ticks. Regenerated + synced.

protein/connected.name: protein/connected
protein/connected.note: switched the demoed domain from DNA binding (1146px, residues 102-292, wider than the alignment tracks own 649px scrollable viewport) to the Oligomerization region (UniProt Region 325-358, 192px) which fits entirely within the panel with no edge clipping. Combined with the scroll action centering fix: tooltip fully on-screen, selection outline precisely aligned with the highlighted alignment columns (verified by close crop), structure + genome highlights all consistent.

sv_cgiab/translocation_open_from_track.name: sv_cgiab/translocation_open_from_track
sv_cgiab/translocation_open_from_track.note: make screenshot slightly taller. please make the screenshot titles a bit better than just 'screenshot' if it makes sense to  DONE: Made the figure taller (viewportHeight 360->440) so the form + Tracks dropdown clear the bottom edge. Left the harness-wide "Screenshot" session title alone (renaming churns all 180 PNGs). Regenerated + verified.

feature_detail_protein.name: feature_detail_protein
feature_detail_protein.note: New figure demonstrating translation exceptions (reviewer ask): SELENOP Protein view highlights the ten selenocysteine (U) residues recoded from in-frame UGA stops via transl_except, amber, with a legend. Added to feature_sequence.md Protein section.

jbrowse-img/multisample_variants.name: jbrowse-img/multisample_variants
jbrowse-img/multisample_variants.note: Not a locus swap. Tested: jb2export static SSR renders the per-sample genotype MATRIX empty for the 1000G phase3 callset even with data loaded locally and rows at 1px (volvox works via a simpler path) -> needs a jb2export matrix-render fix. And real pop data is ref-dominant (grey); the compelling view is colorBy:population, needing adapter samplesTsv -> a small jb2export CLI feature (samplesTsv: modifier). Both noted in the spec comment. Reverted to volvox.

chromhmm.name: chromhmm
chromhmm.note: Wrote docs/tutorials/chromhmm.md (how the multirow-bigBed ChromHMM config is built: combine per-cell-type BEDs with a cellType column -> bed9+1 bigBed -> LinearMultiRowFeatureDisplay partitionField/color(itemRgb jexl)/rowOrder). Linked from introduction.md. Screenshot itself renders fine.

maf_470way.name: maf_470way
maf_470way.note: FIXED end-to-end: (1) the blank-heatmap regression (overlay canvases used raw rowHeight=0 in fit mode instead of effectiveRowHeight); (2) shortened the track (heightOverride 1080->560, rows sub-pixel but the conserved/divergent texture still reads and it is no longer a full-screen wall); (3) added MafIdentityLegend (top-right) naming the ramp red=Divergent / blue=Conserved. Regenerated + verified.

maf_color_by_chromosome.name: maf_color_by_chromosome
maf_color_by_chromosome.note: Reworked from a global name->hue rainbow to a PER-ROW rank scheme (perRowChromRanks + SOURCE_CHROM_PALETTE in drawSourceChrom.ts): within each species row, source chromosomes are ranked by coverage and colored by rank, so every row main chromosome shares the primary blue and only blocks from a different source chromosome take an accent (orange/crimson) — rearrangements pop, no rainbow. Legend is now rank-based (Main/2nd/3rd source). Applies to canvas + SVG export; docs (user+config guides) updated; maf tests green (299).

maf_inversions.name: maf_inversions
maf_inversions.note: [1px tree clip FIXED via TREE_LEFT_PAD 1->2] remaining: inversions still too hard to see; wants a specialized structure-only view (deferred design work)

maf_codon_tooltip.name: maf_codon_tooltip
maf_codon_tooltip.note: Re-verified against current code: the codon tooltip now resolves at chrI:2,999,285 and shows an interesting nonsynonymous change (caeJap4, gene CJA38734, codon GAA->GCC, amino acid E->A, nonsynonymous) rather than the bare 'Ref:' fallback the earlier review saw. Regenerated + verified.
